title: Inquiro
name: INQUIRO
description: Built a RAG system transforming documents into a queryable knowledge base using LangChain, FAISS, and local Mistral models via Ollama and Nomic Embed Text.

title: Sempropos
name: SEMPROPOS
description: Built an open-source Linux CLI that converts natural-language tasks into exact shell commands using local man-page retrieval, hybrid semantic ranking, and lightweight local/remote LLM synthesis.

title: MerkleWatch
name: MERKLEWATCH
description: Developed a CLI-first utility for creating deterministic, tamper-evident directory snapshots using Merkle trees and SHA-256 hashing. Implemented 64KB chunked reading for memory-efficient processing of large files.

title: Praetor
name: PRAETOR
description: Engineered a serverless compliance auditing platform using AWS Lambda and EventBridge to perform 170+ daily security checks across 11 AWS services. Delivered zero-cost cloud security scanning via automated HTML dashboards and Slack integration.

title: ChronoTrace
name: CHRONOTRACE
description: Engineered an advanced forensic analysis tool for detecting timestamp manipulations and log evasion via post-mortem image analysis and real-time live monitoring.

title: Wordsmith
name: WORDSMITH
description: Engineered an AI-driven contextual dictionary and wordlist generator tailored for security professionals. Integrates Groq, Gemini, and OpenAI to automatically extract relevant tokens from unstructured raw intelligence.

title: RBIH IITD Tryst Hackathon
name: RBIH FRAUD PREVENTION
description: Developed Comprehensive Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) Jupyter Notebooks and Reports for the National Fraud Prevention Challenge.

title: OverPage
name: OVERPAGE
description: Developed a Chrome extension designed to scrape active webpages and generate on-demand summaries via an integrated chat interface, using a PHP backend to forward queries to the Google Gemini API.

title: TeleDM
name: TELEDM
description: Developed a desktop application enabling robust, interrupt-tolerant file downloads from Telegram without keeping the client active. Features GUI queue management and SQLite persistent history.

title: ADB Data Fetcher Utility
name: ADB DATA FETCHER
description: Developed a Windows Form desktop application using C# (.NET 8.0) to automate the extraction of SMS, contacts, and logs from Android devices via ADB, with an Entity Framework Core / SQL Server backend.
